title: My earning is easy. My earning is endless.
subtitle: A two-part affirmation for anchoring the belief in uncapped, flowing income.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 34 of the MONEY program. Two statements, said in sequence, for building the felt belief in income without a ceiling.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 34 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you want to anchor the income-ceiling work from the tapping or energy statement practices.

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 34 of the MONEY program. Two statements, said in sequence. The pause between them is part of the practice.
Say each statement three times in the morning, with a pause between them. They are not joined into one sentence: the pause gives each one room to land. Hand on chest if useful.
Adapted from Day 34 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
